# Site: audit.ymtea.club
# Description: Tea Supply Chain Transparency & Compliance Audit Tool.
# Context: Specialized tool by Ymtea for verifying tea origin, quality standards, and supplier reliability.
# Parent-Site: https://ymtea.club

## Tools & Services
- **Quality Audit**: Automated assessment of tea production standards.
- **Compliance Check**: Verification of organic certifications and origin authenticity.
- **Digital Sourcing Guide**: AI-ready data for tea procurement transparency.
